inputs.label: Physical Well-being
inputs.businessContext: Self-assessed physical health and energy levels on a scale of 0 to 10

inputs.label: Mental Well-being
inputs.businessContext: Self-assessed mental clarity, focus, and stress levels on a scale of 0 to 10

inputs.label: Social Well-being
inputs.businessContext: Self-assessed quality of relationships and social support on a scale of 0 to 10

inputs.label: Emotional Well-being
inputs.businessContext: Self-assessed emotional stability and positive affect on a scale of 0 to 10

inputs.label: Spiritual Well-being
inputs.businessContext: Self-assessed sense of purpose and meaning on a scale of 0 to 10
